fields.title: East Eagle Expands into Lithium Mining
fields.excerpt: East Eagle Trading PLC announces new high-grade lithium ore mining operations, strengthening Ethiopia's position in the global battery supply chain.
fields.content:
East Eagle Trading PLC is proud to announce the expansion of our mining operations into high-grade lithium ore extraction and processing.

This strategic move positions our company at the forefront of Ethiopia's growing role in the global renewable energy supply chain. Lithium is a critical component in battery technology, and our operations will serve both domestic and international markets.

Our team has invested in state-of-the-art processing equipment and maintains strict compliance with international mining standards. We are committed to responsible resource extraction that benefits local communities and the broader East African economy.

Contact us to learn more about our mining solutions and export capabilities.
fields.author: East Eagle Team

fields.title: Solar Energy Projects Powering Rural Ethiopia
fields.excerpt: Our solar division completes three new installation projects, bringing clean renewable energy to underserved communities across Ethiopia.
fields.content:
East Eagle Trading PLC's Solar & Energy Solutions division has successfully completed three major solar installation projects in rural Ethiopia.

These projects bring reliable, clean energy to communities that previously lacked access to the electrical grid. Each installation was designed with local conditions in mind, using certified panels and inverters that meet IEC and TUV standards.

Key highlights:
- Total capacity: 2.5 MW across all three sites
- Estimated households served: 1,200+
- Project completion ahead of schedule

We continue to partner with international manufacturers to bring the best solar technology to East Africa. Reach out to discuss your energy infrastructure needs.
fields.author: East Eagle Team

fields.title: New Construction Machinery Fleet Available for Rent
fields.excerpt: East Eagle Trading PLC adds excavators, loaders, and heavy equipment to its rental fleet, supporting Ethiopia's infrastructure boom.
fields.content:
As Ethiopia's infrastructure development accelerates, East Eagle Trading PLC has expanded its construction machinery rental and sales fleet.

New additions include:
- Hydraulic excavators (20T and 35T classes)
- Wheel loaders for material handling
- Compaction equipment for road projects

All machinery is sourced from certified international manufacturers and maintained to the highest operational standards. We offer flexible rental terms — daily, weekly, and monthly — to suit projects of any scale.

Our after-sales team provides on-site maintenance support and spare parts supply to minimize downtime on your projects.

Contact our machinery division for availability and pricing.
fields.author: East Eagle Team

fields.title: Choosing the Right Excavator for Ethiopian Job Sites
fields.excerpt: A practical guide to selecting excavator class, reach, and attachments for roadworks, mining support, and urban construction across Ethiopia.
fields.content:
Selecting the right excavator can make or break project timelines. At East Eagle Trading PLC, we help contractors match machine class to terrain, soil type, and production targets.

Common choices for Ethiopian sites:
- 20-ton class: urban utility trenches, residential foundations, and municipal works
- 30–35 ton class: highway cuts, quarry support, and bulk earthmoving
- Long-reach variants: canal work, dredging-adjacent tasks, and deep excavation

Beyond tonnage, operators should evaluate hydraulic flow for attachments, fuel efficiency on long shifts, and spare-parts availability. We stock certified excavators with service-ready packages so your fleet stays productive.

Talk to our construction machinery team for a site-fit recommendation and delivery timeline.
fields.author: East Eagle Team

fields.title: Wheel Loaders That Keep Aggregate Moving
fields.excerpt: How modern wheel loaders improve cycle times for quarries, batching plants, and logistics yards — and what to look for before you buy or rent.
fields.content:
Wheel loaders are the backbone of material handling on construction and quarry sites. East Eagle supplies loaders sized for Ethiopian aggregate yards, ready-mix plants, and warehouse yards.

What matters most:
- Bucket capacity matched to truck bodies
- Visibility and stability on uneven stockpile surfaces
- Transmission options for stop-start loading cycles
- Tire compound suited to abrasive rock and dust

Our import program focuses on machines with strong aftermarket support. Whether you need a compact yard loader or a high-capacity production unit, we can arrange inspection, shipping, and commissioning support.

Request a quote for current wheel loader availability and financing options.
fields.author: East Eagle Team

fields.title: Road Compaction Equipment for Longer-Lasting Highways
fields.excerpt: Soil and asphalt compactors are essential for durable pavements. Here's how East Eagle supports contractors with the right rollers for Ethiopia's road boom.
fields.content:
Good roads start with proper compaction. As national and regional highway projects expand, contractors need reliable single-drum and tandem rollers that deliver density without over-vibrating sensitive layers.

East Eagle Trading PLC supplies:
- Smooth-drum rollers for embankments and sub-base
- Padfoot options for cohesive soils
- Tandem asphalt rollers for wearing courses

We advise on amplitude settings, pass counts, and moisture control so pavement performance matches design life. Machines arrive with documentation and optional operator orientation for your crew.

Contact us to align compaction equipment with your next road package.
fields.author: East Eagle Team

fields.title: Spare Parts & Downtime: Keeping Heavy Machinery Productive
fields.excerpt: A short downtime strategy for excavators and loaders — filters, wear parts, and planned maintenance that East Eagle can help you stock.
fields.content:
Heavy equipment earns money only when it runs. Unexpected downtime from missing filters, pins, or hydraulic hoses can stall an entire site.

Our construction machinery support approach:
- Critical spare kits for excavators and loaders
- Wear-part planning for buckets, teeth, and cutting edges
- Scheduled maintenance guidance for dusty highland environments
- Fast sourcing through international supplier networks

Pair your machine purchase or rental with a parts plan, and you protect both schedule and margin. East Eagle's team can build a starter inventory list based on your fleet mix and project duration.

Reach out to set up parts support before your next mobilization.
fields.author: East Eagle Team
